output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Get It Back in 60 Seconds

content_outline: Introduction: Why Your Landlord Is Withholding Your Deposit (And Why They’re Wrong)
What Landlords Can and Cannot Legally Deduct in Your State
Legal Deadlines: How Long a Landlord Has to Return Your Security Deposit
Why Texts and Emails Fail — And Why a Demand Letter Works
How to Write a Security Deposit Dispute Letter That Gets Results
Generate Your State-Specific Demand Letter in 60 Seconds with Deposits-Back.com
key_points: Most states require deposit returns within 14–30 days; after that, your landlord is in violation
Normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, and pre-existing damage are not valid deductions
A formal letter of demand citing state statutes is the fastest legal step before small claims court
Deposits-Back.com creates an attorney-reviewed demand letter for $19.99 with no signup or subscription
output.cta: Stop waiting and hoping. Generate your deposit return demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds for just $19.99 — no signup, no subscription, just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting security deposits
